form.formComment: Improved last start with a solid effort when 3rd (Fr2) over 1850m after showing early pace at Marburg beaten 6 m by Lulu Lucifer (2:17.90) in 3yo+ NR 43 to 48 on April 5 at $4. Expected to feature again.

form.formComment: Last start by a neck (Fr5) at this track (2:32.80) beating Vermont in 3yo+ NR up to 39 on April 9 at $5.50. Will be about the money again.

formComments.comment: Last start by a neck (Fr5) at this track (2:32.80) beating Vermont in 3yo+ NR up to 39 on April 9 at $5.50. Will be about the money again.

form.formComment: Last start 4th (Sr2) over 2040m at this track beaten 10 m by Ashlee Nitro (2:29.90) in 3yo+ NR 41 to 47 on April 2 at $21. At the start before was well back in the run when 9th (Fr3) over 1780m after being wide early at this track, beaten 30 m by Merry Jewel (2:08.30) in 3yo+ NR 46 to 53 on March 26 at $71. Place best.

form.formComment: Last start by a head when driven back in the field, (Fr5) held up early, at this track (2:29.90) beating Black Gemstone in 4yo+ NR up to 40 on April 9 at $2.30. In form now and can go on with it.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start by a head when driven back in the field, (Fr5) held up early, at this track (2:29.90) beating Black Gemstone in 4yo+ NR up to 40 on April 9 at $2.30. In form now and can go on with it.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Out of position at the start.

form.formComment: Ran well last start showing plenty of improvement following March 25 run. Just managed to hang on and win won by a head (Fr1) at this track (2:30.30) beating Shes My Mistake in 3yo+ NR 45 to 52 on April 1 at $61. This race will be harder than that win. Could go on with it.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Ran well last start showing plenty of improvement following March 25 run. Just managed to hang on and win won by a head (Fr1) at this track (2:30.30) beating Shes My Mistake in 3yo+ NR 45 to 52 on April 1 at $61. This race will be harder than that win. Could go on with it.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Momentarily taken wider on the track leaving the 1400m.
Utilized the sprint lane in the run to the finish.
Commenced a trailing three wide run from a rearward position leaving the 800m.

form.formComment: First up. At the last run he 6th (Sr2) over 1780m at this track was 4th-7.5m 2WWC at the bell, beaten 12 m by Mikis Joe (2:09.00) in 3yo+ NR 46 to 53 on January 29 at $4.80. A big run would not surprise.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Pulled hard in the early and middle stages of the event.
Led the three wide line up from the bell.

form.formComment: In good form recently. Last start won by 4 m as favourite when quickly away, (Fr4) at Albion Park (1:59.00) beating Miss Munch in 3yo+ NR 40 to 45 on April 10 at $3.60. Sure to be in the finish again.

formComments.comment: In good form recently. Last start won by 4 m as favourite when quickly away, (Fr4) at Albion Park (1:59.00) beating Miss Munch in 3yo+ NR 40 to 45 on April 10 at $3.60. Sure to be in the finish again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up for clear running over the early stages of the home straight.
Inclined to hang inwards on turns throughout the event.

form.formComment: Last start 4th (Fr5) over 1660m at Albion Park, beaten 17 m by Miss Bay King Cole (1:56.50) in 3yo+ NR 45 to 50 on April 10 at $26. Two runs back 3rd (Fr3) over 1780m at this track beaten 10 m by Punters Jewel (2:08.10) in 3yo+ NR 48 to 55 on April 2 at $34. Prefer others on this occasion.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up for clear running in the early stages of the straight.

form.formComment: 12-year-old gelding showed improvement last time. 3rd (Fr2) over 2040m at this track beaten 16 m by Punters Jewel (2:30.20) in 3yo+ NR 46 to 53 on April 9 at $151. The race before was not as impressive when well beaten into fifth behind Bracken Warrior at this track over 1780m in a 3yo+ NR 41 to 46 on March 25 at $12. Not keen on his chances in this line-up.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Pulled hard during the score up.
Locked stays for a short distance in the back straight on the final lap.
Unable to secure clear running over the concluding stages of the event.
